overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage depicting a character traversing ancient stone ruins through parkour mechanics. The character swings across wooden beams and climbs vertical cliff faces in a sunlit desert temple environment with warm sandstone tones.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed ancient temple corridor with overhead wooden beams

events.description: character begins swinging hand-over-hand along the wooden beam
character transitions from swinging to shimmying along the beam

agents.ego_description: hanging from wooden beams and traversing horizontally through the narrow stone corridor

entered.detail: weathered ancient stone wall with rough texture
tall stone wall with carved architectural details
thick horizontal wooden beam used for parkour traversal
ornate stone archway leading deeper into the ruins

segments.scene_description: The character hangs from a wooden beam in a narrow enclosed stone corridor, swinging hand-over-hand through ancient temple ruins. Sunlight filters through gaps in the stone walls, illuminating the weathered textures of the historic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated temple walkway with open canyon views

events.description: character swings across a gap to reach a new section of the beam
view opens up to reveal deep canyon and distant ruins below

agents.ego_description: swinging across gaps between beam sections while traversing the open-air temple structure

entered.detail: expansive view of deep canyon with mist and distant rock formations
ancient temple structures visible across the canyon
suspension bridge spanning the canyon in the distance
bright blue sky visible through the open temple structure

segments.scene_description: The character continues traversing wooden beams as the enclosed corridor opens into an expansive canyon view. The camera reveals distant temple ruins and a rope bridge while the character swings across gaps in the elevated walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical cliff face of ancient temple exterior

events.description: character transitions from horizontal beam to vertical wall climbing
character ascends past wooden lintel into upper temple levels

agents.ego_description: climbing up the vertical stone wall using handholds and ledges

entered.detail: vertical stone cliff face with climbing grips and cracks
horizontal wooden beam at the top of the climb
upper levels of the ancient temple structure visible above

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the horizontal beam and begins ascending a vertical stone cliff face. The camera follows the upward climb as the character grips handholds and approaches a wooden lintel, with the open sky and upper temple ruins visible above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic stone corridor into a vast, open-air canyon ascent. It begins with the character swinging hand-over-hand along wooden beams within narrow temple ruins, where sunlight filters through gaps in the weathered stone walls. As the character continues forward, the enclosed space opens abruptly into an expansive vista, revealing distant ruins and a rope bridge stretching across the canyon. The scene then shifts from horizontal movement to a vertical climb as the character leaves the beams to scale a steep stone cliff face. The camera follows this upward trajectory, tracking the character's grip on handholds toward a wooden lintel under the bright, open sky.
